positive: A stylized, minimalist vector illustration of a leaping fox silhouette surrounded by abstract geometric elements and botanical patterns. The fox is the central, powerful figure, depicted in a deep indigo and burnt orange color palette. Use negative space effectively to enhance the contrast and drama. The composition should be circular and balanced, suitable for a t-shirt print. Style: Modern folk art mixed with mid-century graphic design. Details: Clean lines, solid blocks of color, high contrast, poster-quality print, flat vector graphic, seamless repeat potential, inspired by natural world elegance.
